name: Sirolimus older-adults trial opened as a direct rapalog watch item
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov opened a randomized phase 2 sirolimus trial in adults 65 to 80 years old, with functional, biomarker, feasibility, and safety endpoints.
significance_note: Worth watching because it tests sirolimus in older adults with functional and aging-biomarker endpoints. It should not change the current assessment until results are posted or reported.
